identity.name: Cloud App — Cross-Provider OAuth Grant Rotation (Okta → MS → Google)
identity.summary: Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-004. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1090. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.
identity.description:
Auto-generated draft from CortexSim scenario SIM-CLOUD-004. Plane: CLOUD_APP. Primary technique: T1090. Requires human enrichment of BIOC logic + panw_mapping rule_ids.

Source scenario: SIM-CLOUD-004.
UC: Cross-Provider OAuth Behaviour Stitching / TC: Single Identity Solicits Risky Grants Across 3 IdPs in <5 min.

techniques.name: Use Alternate Authentication Material: Application Access Token

prerequisites.description: Lab environment matching scenario SIM-CLOUD-004 requirements.

payload.code:
# step-1: Provider 1 — Okta risky drive grant
cat > /tmp/cloud-004-okta.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-004
name: "Cloud App — rotation step 1 Okta"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - cortexsim-canary.okta.com
dry_run: false
tags: [cloud-app, cross-provider, rotation]
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: okta
      scope_preset: risky_drive
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-004-okta.yml --live
# step-2: Provider 2 — Microsoft admin-consent grant within 60s
sleep 30
cat > /tmp/cloud-004-ms.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-004
name: "Cloud App — rotation step 2 Microsoft"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - login.microsoftonline.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: microsoft
      scope_preset: admin_consent
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-004-ms.yml --live
# step-3: Provider 3 — Google risky drive grant completes triangle
sleep 30
cat > /tmp/cloud-004-google.yml <<'YML'
campaign_id: CMP-CLOUDAPP-004
name: "Cloud App — rotation step 3 Google"
authorized_by: "domain-consultant@paloaltonetworks.com"
simulation_authorized: true
target_allowlist:
  - accounts.google.com
dry_run: false
steps:
  - step_id: step-01
    plugin: oauth_grant_emulator
    params:
      provider: google
      scope_preset: risky_drive
      iterations: 1
YML
python3 -m scripts.eal_simulator.cli run /tmp/cloud-004-google.yml --live
